name: Nhật - Narrative & Compelling
description: Articulate Vietnamese voice suited for news reports, documentaries, and compelling story narration.

name: Đuc Huy
description: A warm, expressive young male voice with a distinctive Southern Vietnamese accent. Clear pronunciation, calm delivery, and a natural storytelling tone make it ideal for TV voice-overs, news narration, documentaries, podcasts, and inspirational content. The voice feels trustworthy, grounded, and emotionally engaging, with a smooth flow that remains comfortable for long listening sessions.

name: Nhu - Calm and Confident
description: Nhu – Calm and Confident - Native Vietnamese female voice with a clear and authentic Hanoi accent. Suitable for general-purpose text-to-speech, narration, and creative voice applications.

name: Phong - Warm, Clear and Expressive
description: Nhật Phong - Podcast - Warm and clear tone, natural expressiveness. Great for podcasts, storytelling, and educational content.
